full_text:
Xue Lan 薛蘭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Lan (薛蘭)was born in Shanyang. Defeated and killed Li Qian but was defeated and executed himself by Cao Cao a year later. Xue Lan was affiliated with Lu Bu. Xue Lan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
